news.paragraph: Airbnb is navigating mixed sentiment following an Argus Research price target increase to $165 and a maintained Buy rating. This positive outlook is offset by a recent SEC filing showing an insider sale of shares worth approximately $8.85 million. Options traders should consider the tension between the upgraded valuation and the significant insider selling when assessing potential direction.
headlines: Airbnb Insider Sold Shares Worth $8,853,375, According to a Recent SEC Filing
Argus Adjusts Price Target on Airbnb to $165 From $145, Maintains Buy Rating
